screen.title: Notifications
screen.intro: Manage meal reminders, notification access, and the notification preferences available in Fitaly today.
screen.mealRemindersFooter: Create reminders for specific meals or use Other when the reminder should stay more general.
screen.noMealRemindersBody: Create a reminder to get a recurring prompt at the time and days you choose.
screen.smartReminderHint: Smart Reminders can adjust timing to your day, recent logging and quiet hours.
screen.permissionOnBody: Fitaly can deliver reminders and other notifications on this device.
screen.permissionOffBody: Turn on system notifications to receive meal reminders and other notification types on time.
screen.permissionCheckingBody: Fitaly is still checking whether this device can receive notifications.
screen.motivationSubtitle: Encouragement nudges that use your existing notification preference path.
screen.statsSubtitle: Weekly summary notifications based on the current stored preference.
screen.loadingBody: Reminder settings are still loading from your account.

form.name: Name
form.mealFocusIntro: Choose which meal this reminder should refer to.
form.textOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the standard reminder message.
form.previewBody: Your reminder is currently set for {{time}}.

meal_reminder.title: Time to eat
meal_reminder.body_detailed: You usually eat {{meal}} now. Add it to keep your log accurate.

calorie_goal.title: Calorie goal
calorie_goal.body_detailed: You are about {{kcal}} kcal below your goal. Consider a light meal.

day_fill.title: Fill the day
day_fill.body_detailed: It looks like today is empty. Add meals to keep your history complete.

permissions.title: Enable notifications
permissions.message: Turn on notifications in system settings to receive reminders, including Smart Reminders, on time.
